settings.text:
Beg Borrow Steal Studio
Website: https://begborrowstealstudio.com/

At Beg Borrow Steal Studio, privacy, trust, and transparency are an essential part of the experience we create for our customers. Our brand is built around carefully curated vintage, archival, and deadstock fashion pieces that carry history, individuality, and timeless value. Just as we protect the authenticity of every piece we source, we are committed to protecting the personal information shared with us by our customers.

This Privacy Policy explains how Beg Borrow Steal Studio collects, uses, stores, and safeguards your information when you visit our website, explore our collections, place an order, or communicate with our team. By accessing our website or purchasing from us, you acknowledge and agree to the practices described in this policy.

Information We Collect

To provide a smooth and reliable shopping experience, we may collect certain information from customers when they browse our website, create an order, or contact us for assistance.

The information collected may include:

• Full name
• Email address
• Phone number
• Billing and shipping address
• Order details and purchase history
• Payment confirmation details
• Customer support conversations
• Website activity and browsing preferences

We collect only the information necessary to process orders, improve our services, and provide customers with a secure and personalised shopping experience.

How We Use Your Information

Customer information helps us operate our website efficiently and deliver the level of service expected from Beg Borrow Steal Studio. Your details allow us to process purchases, manage communication, and maintain a reliable shopping experience.

We may use your information to:

• Confirm and process orders
• Arrange shipping and delivery services
• Provide customer support
• Manage exchange requests where applicable
• Maintain purchase and authenticity records
• Improve our website functionality
• Prevent fraudulent or unauthorized activity
• Share updates about collections, launches, and promotions

Your information will always be used responsibly and only for purposes connected with improving your experience with our brand.

Vintage, Archival & Purchase Records

Beg Borrow Steal Studio specializes in rare vintage and deadstock garments. Many of our pieces are one-of-one, limited in availability, and sourced for their craftsmanship, history, and cultural relevance.

Due to the unique nature of our collections, we may maintain purchase records and related information to assist with product verification, customer support, authenticity references, exchange reviews, and internal records.

Payment Security

We understand the importance of safe and secure transactions. All payments made through our website are handled using trusted and secure payment processing services.

Beg Borrow Steal Studio does not store complete credit card, debit card, banking, or sensitive payment information on our systems.

We use reasonable security practices designed to protect customer information against unauthorized access, misuse, or disclosure.

Shipping and Delivery Information

To successfully deliver your purchases, certain customer information such as name, contact details, and shipping address may be shared with trusted logistics and delivery partners.

These details are shared only for completing delivery services and providing order-related assistance.

Cookies and Website Experience

Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to create a better browsing experience. These tools help us understand how visitors interact with our website and allow us to improve our services.

Cookies may be used for:

• Improving website performance
• Remembering preferences
• Understanding customer interests
• Analysing website traffic
• Enhancing the shopping journey

Customers can manage or disable cookies through their browser settings if preferred.

Sharing of Personal Information

Beg Borrow Steal Studio respects customer privacy. We do not sell, rent, or trade personal information with outside parties.

Information may only be shared with trusted service providers required for business operations, including:

• Payment processing providers
• Shipping and logistics companies
• Website technology partners
• Analytics and operational service providers

These partners only receive the information necessary to perform their specific services.

Marketing and Brand Communication

With your permission, we may share updates about new arrivals, exclusive vintage drops, special collections, offers, and brand announcements.

Our communication is designed to keep our community informed about carefully curated pieces and upcoming releases. Customers may choose to unsubscribe from promotional communication whenever applicable.

Protection and Storage of Information

We take appropriate steps to protect customer data and maintain a secure shopping environment. Customer information is retained only for as long as required for business operations, legal requirements, customer support, and record purposes.

Although we follow reasonable security practices, no online platform can guarantee complete security. Customers are encouraged to protect their account information and use secure browsing practices.

Your Rights and Choices

Customers may contact Beg Borrow Steal Studio regarding their personal information, including requests related to updating, correcting, or reviewing their details where applicable.

We aim to handle all privacy-related requests with transparency and care.

Third-Party Websites

Our website may contain links, tools, or integrations provided by third-party platforms. Beg Borrow Steal Studio is not responsible for the privacy policies, security practices, or content of external websites.

We encourage customers to review third-party policies before sharing personal information outside our website.

Children’s Privacy

Our website and services are intended for individuals who are legally eligible to make online purchases. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

Beg Borrow Steal Studio may update or modify this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, services, or legal requirements.

Any updates will be published on this page. Continued use of our website means acceptance of the updated policy.

Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal information, please contact us:

Beg Borrow Steal Studio
Website: https://begborrowstealstudio.com/
Email: begborrowstealstudio@gmail.com
Address: New Shams, Turner Road, Bandra West, Mumbai - 400050, Maharashtra, India

Thank you for trusting Beg Borrow Steal Studio and supporting consciously curated vintage, archival, and timeless fashion.
